title: richText document
description: TipTap (ProseMirror) JSON document. The shape every text-bearing field in the resource schema points at.

type.description: Node type. Canonical values: `paragraph`, `heading`, `bulletList`, `orderedList`, `listItem`, `blockquote`, `codeBlock`, `horizontalRule`, `text`, `math`, `hardBreak`, `image`. Renderers ignore unknown types.

content.description: Child nodes. Absent on leaf nodes (text, math, hardBreak, image, horizontalRule).

marks.description: Inline annotations on a text node.

type.description: Mark type. Canonical values: `bold`, `italic`, `underline`, `strike`, `code`, `link`, `highlight`, `subscript`, `superscript`, `textStyle` (carries colour in `attrs.color`).
